evidence_summary: PG-060 adds the missing required artifact apps/web/src/lib/leads/lead-enrichment.ts (pure, synchronous, no network/LLM/tRPC) deriving website/company from the email domain, wires it into the existing New Lead page via the email onBlur (non-destructive), and adds an accessibility pass (aria-invalid/aria-describedby + aria-live region + step-group label). 'assignment automated' is satisfied by the existing ownerId = creator behavior (apps/api/src/modules/lead/lead.router.ts:484). Two out-of-scope findings tracked (issues #379, #380). TDD RED->GREEN: 49 lib tests + 6 new page tests (4 wiring + 2 a11y); existing 6 page tests preserved.

definition_of_done_items.item: Artifact apps/web/src/app/leads/(list)/new/page.tsx exists and creates leads via api.lead.create
Artifact apps/web/src/lib/leads/lead-enrichment.ts exists (enrichment working — derives website/company from email domain, non-destructive)
Assignment automated (ownerId = creator on create; no manual owner-selection step)
Response < 200ms (no added network latency; enrichment is synchronous/pure)

validation_results.name: Lint
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web exec eslint <4 touched files> && prettier --check

kpi_results.actual: Statements 98.18%, Branches 95.55%, Functions 100%, Lines 100% (88 lib + page tests)
Enrichment is synchronous/pure (zero added latency); lead.create unchanged

notes: Scope: web-layer only. lead-enrichment.ts is a new pure module imported by the New Lead page (Gate 2b import-reachability PASS). 'assignment automated' = existing ownerId=creator (no routing engine in scope). Out-of-scope findings filed per Rule 8: dead autoAssignment toggle (issue #379) and annualRevenue->estimatedValue NaN (issue #380, owned by IFC-242), both in debt-ledger.yaml. SVG icon rewrite excluded (ESLint passes; no DESIGN mockup). STOA verdicts: Domain PASS, Foundation PASS. Lighthouse Path A (production build, port 3400) — real run, 0.97 performance. ReDoS hotfix (SonarCloud S5852 on PR #383): normalizeWebsiteUrl trailing-slash strip switched from the quadratic regex /\/+$/ to an O(n) reverse scan. Codex independent review (4 issues, all fixed): (1) removed the corrupting annualRevenue->estimatedValue parseFloat mapping (band strings like '1M-10M' parsed to 100 cents) — estimatedValue is no longer derived from the banded company-revenue selector (proper persistence owned by IFC-242); (2) client email validation now uses the shared emailSchema (accepts multi-label/ccSLD domains, matching the server + the enrichment lib); (3) extractDomain now rejects URL syntax (slash/port/query) via isValidHost so no bogus website URLs are derived; (4) the ReDoS guard test uses a per-test timeout (Vitest-4 signature) instead of a flaky wall-clock assertion. Rebased onto current main (now-gated: codex semantic-review at pre-push, sonarjs/slow-regex, stricter diff-coverage). Per the codex gate, fix (1) was upgraded from 'omit estimatedValue' to an explicit REVENUE_BAND_TO_CENTS lookup ('1M-10M' -> 100_000_000 = $1M lower bound; empty -> omitted). 89 lib+page tests green; turbo lint --force 35/35. The local codex semantic-review gate (HIGH wrong-field-mapping) rejected mapping annualRevenue into estimatedValue (company revenue != lead deal value; IFC-242), so fix (1) was reverted to OMITTING estimatedValue (codex-recommended; a real finding, not waived). To satisfy the #382 diff-coverage gate without dropping the CI coverage-floor, the New Lead form logic was extracted (operator-approved) into a co-located client component apps/web/src/app/leads/(list)/new/NewLeadForm.tsx (measured by Istanbul: 96.12% lines / 95.07% statements), leaving page.tsx a thin route shell that re-exports it. page.tsx stays under the standing apps/web/src/app/**/page.tsx coverage-exclude (route shells carry no logic), so the diff-coverage gate measures the extracted component's changed lines (>=80%) while untested page shells remain excluded and the ratchet floor (lines 78%) holds. page.test.tsx now imports NewLeadForm directly. lib + page suites green. POST-EXTRACTION codex review (operator-directed 'Fix' across three escalations): ~13 further real fixes across the stack + 6 source-anchored waivers (tools/audit/codex-review-waivers.yaml), codex gate PASS (0 unwaived). Web/form: HIGH conditional-hook-call — api.lead.create.useMutation was declared AFTER the auth-gate early return (Rules-of-Hooks crash on the loading->authenticated transition), hoisted above the gate; blank-source mislabel — mapSourceToEnum now returns undefined for an unselected source so the payload omits source and the schema default applies; invalid-email-enrichment — extractDomain rejects internal whitespace; stale-auto-fill — enrichment tracks auto-filled fields and refreshes them on an email-domain change without clobbering hand-edited values; form reset on success clears the unsaved-changes registry. Backend Lead-360 (operator: 'fix all Lead-360 fields'): location/website/avatarUrl/estimatedValue/lastContactedAt/tags were modelled by the domain entity + DB columns + Zod schema but DROPPED by PrismaLeadRepository's persistence mapping + mapLeadToResponse — now persisted (toPersistence), hydrated (recordToLeadProps, replacing 6 duplicated inline mappings) and surfaced (mapLeadToResponse); estimatedValue persists null (not 0) when unset. Atomic qualification note (operator: 'note atomic in backend'): the required 'Other' source detail + BANT fields (no first-class column yet — IFC-242/IFC-004) ride on create as an optional createLeadSchema.qualificationNote, persisted ATOMICALLY with the lead via a Prisma nested write in LeadRepository.save (single transaction) — replacing a best-effort second write and a non-atomic compensating delete. Backend tests added (repository nested-write + Lead-360, api mapper, router opts-forwarding). Waivers raised for operator review: 73cace13 (estimatedValue hallucination citing a non-existent REVENUE_BAND_TO_CENTS line), 8058d06e (blank-source->WEBSITE-default is accepted design — making source mandatory reverses the spec'd optional-source form), 036e220e (requiring qualificationNote for source=OTHER is a form-UX rule not an API invariant; first-class sourceOther owned by IFC-242), 048f7556 + 05a2bcad (two reproduced hallucinations citing removed code; grep/git-show confirm the code is fixed). Rebased onto current main; all per-package suites green.
